enemy.name: The Proctor
enemy.special: onPlayerNoCharge: gains +1 Strength. Currently charging a 7-dmg Seismic Slam on next turn with charge intent.

hand.name: Double Strike
hand.description: Next attack card hits twice at full power. Charge bonus: also pierces.

hand.name: Recycle
hand.description: Draw 3 cards. Charge bonus: recover from discard.

notes: Proctor has 6 block, is gaining 6 more (total 12 after this turn), AND has Strength 2. AP budget is 3. Double Strike (2ap) + Piercing (1ap) would bypass ALL block and double-hit. But Double Strike costs 2 AP and Heavy Strike costs 2 AP — can't use both. Or use Piercing (1) + Weaken (1) + strike (but no strike in hand). Recycle to fish? This is a real decision tree with AP constraints. Chain 2 is active, boosting damage.
